$comment: Synthetic PII samples used by the masking-parity case. Values are fabricated — Luhn-valid card and SIN are synthesized for checksum exercises and are NOT real account numbers. Rule identifiers follow the canonical set defined in schemas/scrubber-rules.matrix.json.

samples.description: Email addresses in freeform text are redacted by the regex:email rule

attributes.supportMessage: Please reach out to me at test.user@example.com — thanks!

samples.description: US SSN in strict 3-2-4 format is redacted

attributes.note: My SSN is 123-45-6789 for the form

samples.description: Canadian SIN that passes Luhn is redacted; 9-digit non-Luhn strings are left alone
Credit-card candidates that pass Luhn are redacted
Multiple rules fire on the same event when independent PII is present

attributes.message: Reach me at combo@example.com or +15551230000; my card 4242424242424242 is on file.
